content:
Character: Jamal Osei
Perception: Jamal is presentable — neat, composed, carries himself with a maturity beyond his years. He's intellectually sharp; his legal writing samples are better than most first-years I've seen at my firm. He's earnest, disciplined, humble in a way that feels genuine rather than performed. He's a mentee of sorts — I think he sees me as a useful advisor, maybe someone he respects professionally. I know he's first-generation, works at the coffee shop, carries significant loan debt. I see my own younger self in his determination. I want him to succeed without making the sacrifices I did.
summary:

He's a mentee of sorts — I think he sees me as a useful advisor, maybe someone he respects professionally. I know he's first-generation, works at the coffee shop, carries significant loan debt. I see my own younger self in his determination. I want him to succeed without making the sacrifices I did.
